data.name: CalcInfoHeader.Expression
data.value: [SendDeposit] + ':' + Char(13) + [Fax] + ': 1-800-388-5651' + Char(13) + [Email] + ': dep@intermexusa.com' + Char(13) + [CellPhone] + ': 305-632-8767' + Char(13) + Char(13) + [LikeInfo] + ' 1 (877)256-0390'

data.name: CalcNote.Expression
data.value: ' ' + Trim([InvoiceNote1]) + ' ' + '' + Trim([bold italic]) + ' ' + '' + Trim([InvoiceNoteOther]) + ' ' + ' '
